name: PGYTECH OneGo Drawstring Bag Camera Bag One Go Drawstring
description: The versatile forest OneGo Drawstring Bag from PGYTECH can be used to carry camera gear or everyday items. Carry it by hand, wear it over your shoulder, or use it as a camera cube inside a larger bag. It accommodates a small or medium mirrorless camera plus an extra lens.

features.Key Features: Holds Small/Medium Mirrorless CameraAlso Holds Extra Lens and Accessories | Carry by Hand or Wear over Shoulder | Use as Camera Cube in Larger Bags | Secure Drawstring Closure | Security Clasps, Hidden AirTag Pocket | 2 Interior Dividers
